creator: greenny380@gmail.com
text:
Hello,
May be i was not clear in problem report
but this wrong:
Synopsis: 	www/webkit-gtk2 1.4.3 failed to link when WITH_VIDEO=true enabled.
should be:
Synopsis: 	www/webkit-gtk2 1.4.3 failed to link when WITH_VIDEO=true disabled.

<FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:
